    Enum CadAttachmentType

    Cad attachment point type

    Namespace: Aspose.CAD.FileFormats.Cad.CadConsts

public enum CadAttachmentType

    BottomCenter

    The bottom center

    BottomLeft

    The bottom left

    BottomRight

    The bottom right

    MiddleCenter

    MiddleLeft

    MiddleRight
